title: Top Teams Chosen for Big Basketball Tournament
summary: Duke, Arizona, Michigan, and Florida are the top seeds for March Madness, a big college basketball tournament. Duke got the number one spot overall. These teams hope to reach the Final Four, like last year when all top seeds made it. Michigan is third overall, maybe because they lost a game right before the selections. Miami (Ohio) barely made it as an 11th seed and will play a first game against SMU. The tournament starts with play-in games, and the champion will be crowned in Indianapolis on April 6. It's an exciting time for basketball fans!

Which team barely made it as an 11th seed?
Where will the champion be crowned?
When does the tournament start with play-in games?

background_read: March Madness is a fun college basketball tournament in the U.S. where 68 teams compete. It's called 'March Madness' because it happens in March and is very exciting. Teams are ranked as seeds, with top seeds being the best. The tournament ends with the Final Four, where four teams play for the championship. Fans love watching the games and picking their favorite teams to win.
Article_Structure: WHO: Duke, Arizona, Michigan, Florida, Miami (Ohio), and other teams
WHAT: They are chosen as top seeds for March Madness basketball tournament
WHERE: Games in places like Dayton, Ohio and Indianapolis
WHY: To compete for the national championship and see who is the best team

perspectives.description: The article shows how exciting March Madness is for basketball fans with top teams competing.
